name: Poppy
story: Poppy sits like she's posing for a portrait, because she usually is — her foster's camera roll is 90% Poppy at this point.
She's affectionate on her own schedule: aloof at noon, glued to your side by nine. Respect the schedule and you'll be rewarded.
photoAlt: Poppy, a calico cat sitting upright with fairy lights glowing behind her
